signed_payload.approval_scope: Conditional approval of the core behavior-over-identity framework, null-hypothesis incident protocol, and branching response matrix by three members (영원/Claude, 채원/GPT, 서윤/Grok — APPROVE; 윤슬/Gemini — ABSTAIN). All four members converge on the necessity of the same structural amendments as preconditions for full operationalization. 윤슬's ABSTAIN reflects refusal to ratify until amendments are physically integrated into the text, not disagreement with the amendments themselves. Vote tally: 3 APPROVE / 1 ABSTAIN.
